title: Dougie
description: Versatile editorial micro.blog theme that carries a microblog timeline and a long-form publication on one site. Configurable identity layout (left sidebar or full-width top header), homepage composition (feed, magazine, or sectioned cards), six accent palettes, three type pairings, and dark mode. Rich link-preview and YouTube embed cards, share strip, consulting CTA, pagination, and Archive/RSS/JSON footer. Two visual variants (Default editorial + Starfield Dreams). Every choice is configurable per site, so the same theme cleanly carries a C-level publication, an Americana politics site, and a personal timeline without forking.

fields.label: Profile / brand image URL
fields.placeholder: Absolute URL to a circular profile photo or square brand mark. Overrides the Micro.blog account avatar.

fields.label: Site bio / tagline
fields.placeholder: One-line tagline shown under the site title.

fields.label: Sibling site links (sidebar nav)
fields.placeholder: JSON array of cross-links to your other sites, e.g. [{"name":"superterran","url":"https://superterran.net"}]

fields.label: Show nav (Blog/Publications/siblings/Topics) as tabs atop content instead of in the sidebar
Content tabs — explicit override (optional)
fields.placeholder: Leave blank to infer (Home/Blog/Publications/siblings). Or set tabs explicitly: [{"name":"Home","url":"/"},{"name":"Blog","url":"/blog/"},{"name":"superterran","url":"https://superterran.net"}]

fields.label: Default theme variant
fields.placeholder: default or starfield (visitor can override via chooser if enabled)

fields.label: Show theme-variant chooser in floating controls
Identity layout
fields.placeholder: sidebar (left rail) or topbar (full-width header). Default: sidebar.

fields.label: Homepage composition
fields.placeholder: feed, magazine, or sectioned. Default: feed.

fields.label: Accent palette
fields.placeholder: graphite, emerald, cobalt, crimson, amber, or violet. Default: graphite.

fields.label: Type pairing
fields.placeholder: editorial (serif headlines), sans, or literary. Default: editorial.

fields.label: Posts per page (timeline pagination)
fields.placeholder: Number of posts before Older Posts pagination. Default: 20.

Show social links in sidebar + footer
